title: WA Robot Search Index Reindex Response
description: Schema for the data field when calling 'wa robot search-index reindex'. Returns the batch, filter, and document-accounting summary for a forced search index rebuild.

batch_size.description: Batch size used while replaying capture history into the index

pane_filter.description: If set, only this pane was reindexed

since_filter.description: If set, only segments captured at or after this timestamp (epoch ms) were considered

until_filter.description: If set, only segments captured at or before this timestamp (epoch ms) were considered

scanned_segments.description: Segments scanned from storage during reindex

submitted_docs.description: Documents submitted to the index writer

skipped_empty_docs.description: Segments skipped because they contained no indexable text

skipped_duplicate_docs.description: Documents skipped as duplicates of existing indexed content

skipped_cass_docs.description: Documents skipped because they belong to Cass capture data

skipped_resize_pause_docs.description: Documents skipped because they were classified as resize/pause noise

deferred_rate_limited_docs.description: Documents deferred because indexing rate limits were reached

flushed_docs.description: Documents flushed to disk during this run

expired_docs.description: Documents expired by retention cleanup during this run

evicted_docs.description: Documents evicted to satisfy index size limits

pane_metadata_docs.description: Metadata-only pane documents emitted during reindex

flush_operations.description: Number of explicit writer flush operations performed

final_document_count.description: Document count after the reindex completed

final_index_size_bytes.description: Approximate on-disk index size after the run

source_counts.description: Accepted document counts grouped by source type
